violations.text: The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in poor repair: 1) The floor to wall junctures of breakroom wall and floor had broken seals with exposed holes. 2) multiple floor tiles were missing in health & beauty area and lawn & garden area during time of inspection. 3) Ceiling tiles in the retail areas of establishment were stained and various tiles observed with holes. Physical facilities shall remain in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in poor repair: 1) The floor to wall junctures of a room in the back storage area had broken seals with exposed holes 2) Ceiling tiles in the retail area of establishment were stained due to water leakage New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
